description: Define maintenance tasks that trigger notifications when a tracked vehicle crosses a configured odometer, engine hours, or time threshold, with automatic repeat reminders at regular intervals for ongoing maintenance schedules.

actors.name: Fleet Administrator
actors.description: Creates and manages maintenance task definitions per device or group

actors.name: Maintenance Event Handler
actors.description: Evaluates each incoming position against all active maintenance definitions for the device

actors.name: Maintenance Team
actors.description: Receives maintenance reminders and records service completion

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the maintenance task (e.g. Oil change, Tyre rotation, Annual inspection)

fields.name: tracking_type
fields.description: The metric to track: odometer (metres), hours (milliseconds), or a time field (server_time, device_time)

fields.name: start_value
fields.description: The tracking metric value at which the first reminder fires

fields.name: period_value
fields.description: Interval at which the reminder repeats after the initial trigger; zero means fire once only

fields.name: device_id
fields.description: Device this maintenance task applies to (or inherited from group)

rules: The first reminder fires when the tracking metric crosses start_value (previous value < start_value <= current value)
If period_value > 0, subsequent reminders fire each time the metric increases by another period_value interval beyond start_value
Interval boundary crossing is detected mathematically; if a large GPS gap causes multiple intervals to be skipped, a reminder fires for the current crossing only
Maintenance definitions can be assigned to individual devices, to groups (inherited by all devices in the group), or to a user account
Only the latest position for each device is evaluated; outdated positions do not trigger maintenance reminders
A reminder event stores the maintenance task ID and the current tracking value so the service record can be annotated with the relevant mileage or hours

given: position is the latest for the device

then.description: Maintenance reminder event recorded with type = maintenance, maintenance_id, current tracking value

initial_reminder_fired.result: Maintenance reminder event stored; notification dispatched to assigned users

given: current tracking value has crossed a period boundary beyond start_value
position is the latest for the device
periodic_reminder_fired.result: Repeat reminder fired; next service interval boundary has been reached

given: current tracking value has not crossed any maintenance boundary
no_threshold_crossed.result: No reminder generated; maintenance is not yet due

errors.message: The device referenced does not exist
The specified maintenance definition does not exist

events.name: maintenance.due
events.description: A maintenance threshold has been reached for a tracked vehicle

related.description: Odometer values are the primary trigger metric for distance-based maintenance
Engine hours provide an alternative maintenance trigger for equipment tracked by running time
Each position update drives the maintenance threshold evaluation
